texto: Dear Rocky,Here I am taking my pencil in my hand to say hello, hoping you are in the best of health, both physically and mentally. As for me, I am fine thanks to Almighty God.The weather in the valley is in the shits. It's been raining since Thanksgiving and here it is almost at the end of December and it's still raining. Instead of growing a prick, I think I'm going to grow a tail, like a tadpole. Ha, ha, ha!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rocky Gamez: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Dear Rocky,Here I am taking my pencil in my hand to say hello, hoping you are in the best of heal…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humour, lgbtq pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e termino.

frase_original: Dear Rocky,Here I am taking my pencil in my hand to say hello, hoping you are in the best of health, both physically and mentally. As for me, I am fine thanks to Almighty God.The weather in the valley is in the shits. It's been raining since Thanksgiving and here it is almost at the end of December and it's still raining. Instead of growing a prick, I think I'm going to grow a tail, like a tadpole. Ha, ha, ha!
